data.title: 'If You Paid $1 In Federal Income Taxes, You Paid More' Than Tesla Or Amazon, Says Bernie Sanders As He Takes On Billionaires For Tax Inequities
data.description: Sen. Bernie Sanders (I-VT) highlighted the tax inequities of major corporations and billionaires, emphasizing the need for wealth tax reform.

data.title: Tesla Stock Is Trading Lower Wednesday: What's Going On?
